experiences.title: Founder & CEO
experiences.description: Mobilytics provides real-time, one-to-one, privacy-compliant audience measurement.
experiences.location: New York, New York, United States

experiences.title: Founder & CEO
experiences.description: Helping brands maximize their advertising results with a unique combination of mobile ads and technology. Movia installs tracking and Wi-Fi collecting devices onto trucks acting as moving billboards, offering real-time impression analytics and retargeting opportunities. Brands can view their real-time dashboard to see when where and who saw their message and track their ROI. They can then build relevant audiences and reach them again on their mobile devices, increasing overall effectiveness far beyond what traditional OOH can offer.

experiences.title: Canadian Delegate YEA G20
experiences.description: Attended the 2018 YEA G20 Summit in Buenos Aires as a Canadian Delegate. Made incredible international connections and I'm always proud to represent!

experiences.title: Co Founder
experiences.description:
Note: Homebrew (ing) is the process of making beer/wine/spirits in a person’s home or at an on-premise location. 

Axle Plastic Inc. is the innovative leader in the homebrewing market supplying FastFack, FastFerment, and FastLabel as it core product lines. 

www.fastbrewing.com

Since launching the first product, FastRack24 (Beer) in January 2013, the product has been listed in over 1 400+ retail stores across 40 countries. Additional product lines have been launched including FastRack12 for Wine and Bomber bottles, FastLabel for labeling and FastFerment which is a new conical fermenter that is revolutionizing the homebrew industry. The company will continue to seek new innovations, to market to the homebrew industry and will be listed in over 2 000+ retail stores by the end of 2015. The company had over 300% revenue growth in 2014 is on course for over 300% revenue growth in 2015. The company works with approx. 80 suppliers with final manufacturing being concentrated in Michigan and China. Axle Plastic is privately owned and operated in downtown Toronto by the founders.

experiences.title: Assistant Sales Manager
experiences.description: Team Leader and Assistant Sales Manager for a door to door sales team of 50 individuals. Specializing in HVAC equipment including: furnaces, boilers, AC's, and water heaters.
experiences.location: 1 Eglinton Ave. East Suite 202 Toronto, ON M4P 3A1

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: Ready Set Recycle is committed to the goal of diverting all cell phones, printer cartridges, rechargeable batteries, and small electronics from landfills to responsible recycling streams. The company primarily operates across Nova Scotia where it was founded. We are in the midst of expanding the program to include other provinces and territories. Stay tuned for updates.

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: We host the largest sustainability trade show/festival in Atlantic Canada. The goal of the Event is to unite individuals, organizations, and government agencies with environmentally-friendly products, services, and initiatives. The goal is to have huge social impacts in the communities we host events in and help them become more efficient and sustainable for now and in the future.

experiences.title: Exploration and Development
experiences.description: Mined gold and platinum group metals in Central BC and Dawson City, Yukon. Processed materials using a Knelson Concentrator which utilizes Centrifugal Gravity Concentration as well as sluice box and dredging equipment. I was also introduced to Aqua Regia and Fire Assaying methods for refining precious metal content in concentrates.

accomplishment_projects.title: Fastrack Beer Bottle Cleanser
accomplishment_projects.description: •	Used SolidWorks to produce prototype designs for this startup beer bottle cleaning solution •	Wrote an in depth proposal about the designs and cost benefit analysis •	Performed rapid prototyping, printing six models of the manifold •	Fabricated and assembled the product's initial design •	Compiled a final report for the overall project

recommendations:
Duc Nguyen, CISSP

I had the pleasure to work under Casey's supervision as an intern in HaulerAds. His great leadership and mentorship helped me a lot in understanding the tech industry and developing numerous soft skills. If you are looking for opportunities in entrepreneurship and tech industry, Casey is a wonderful person to work with.

Matthew Hunt

Casey is great to work with. He's a giver and driver. Working with him has-been such a pleasure. If you get a chance to work with him or a chance to partner with Casey, jump at it!
